pageDescription: Calculate your credit card payments, interest charges, and payoff timeline to manage debt and plan repayment strategies

interest.title: Credit Card Interest
interest.description: Interest is charged on unpaid balances and compounds daily

minimumPayments.title: Minimum Payments
minimumPayments.description: Paying only minimums extends payoff time and increases total interest

debtReduction.title: Debt Reduction Strategies
debtReduction.description: Paying more than minimums significantly reduces payoff time and interest

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides credit card payment estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual account terms may vary based on card issuer policies and fees

importantNotesList: Credit card interest compounds daily, making debt grow quickly
Paying only minimums can take years to payoff and cost hundreds in interest
Extra payments directly reduce principal and save on interest
Consider balance transfer offers for high-interest debt consolidation

messages.enterInformation: Enter your credit card information to calculate payoff timeline
messages.resultMessage: Your credit card calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides credit card payment estimates based on standard financial formulas. Actual account terms, payments, and interest may vary based on card issuer policies, fees, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized debt management advice and repayment strategies, consult credit counselors or financial advisors with expertise in debt reduction and individual financial circumstances.

errors.balance: Please enter a valid credit card balance
errors.interestRate: Please enter a valid annual interest rate
errors.monthlyPayment: Please enter a valid monthly payment amount
errors.minimumPayment: Please enter a valid minimum payment percentage
errors.extraPayment: Please enter a valid extra payment amount

tooltips.balance: Current outstanding balance on your credit card
tooltips.interestRate: Annual Percentage Rate (APR) charged on unpaid balances
tooltips.monthlyPayment: Amount you plan to pay each month
tooltips.minimumPayment: Percentage of balance that represents minimum payment
tooltips.extraPayment: Additional amount paid each month toward principal
tooltips.paymentStrategy: Method used to determine monthly payment amount

your_balance_will_be_paid_off_in_20: Your balance will be paid off in:
showing_first_24_months_download_csv_for: Showing first 24 months. Download CSV for complete schedule.
enter_your_credit_card_information_to_se: Enter your credit card information to see payoff results
new_balance_previous_balance_1_monthly_r: New Balance = Previous Balance × (1 + Monthly Rate) - Payment
n_lnp_p_b_r_ln1_r_41: n = ln(P / (P - B₀ × r)) ÷ ln(1 + r)
